column8: Jim dropped his pen and bent to pick it___________ .
column10: Try to eat your dinner, Jane. You've just been picking__________it.

column13: Can you pick_______your sister in the crowd?
column14: She started criticising my work in front of my colleagues. Everything that I did she picked__________no matter how trivial.
column15: Sarah picked_________a plate of cheese for supper, but she wasn't really hungry.
